name: Crocs, Inc.
business: Crocs, Inc. designs, develops, markets, distributes, and sells casual lifestyle footwear and accessories under the Crocs and HEYDUDE brands. The vast majority of Crocs footwear uses proprietary Croslite material for comfort and lightweight. Products are sold in more than 85 countries through wholesale and direct-to-consumer channels.
sellsTo: wholesale partners (multi-brand retailers, mono-branded partner stores, e-tailers, distributors)
direct-to-consumer (company-operated stores, e-commerce sites, third-party marketplaces)

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the design, development, worldwide marketing, distribution, and sale of casual lifestyle footwear and accessories for all.
Digital sales include sales directly to consumers through our company-owned websites and third-party marketplaces as well as wholesale sales to our global e-tailers.
